scope_note: QA Witt Tower Orbit Price Volatility Certificate [457]. Tests whether QA orbit class (S/Sat/C on mod-27 rank bins) predicts NEXT-MONTH PRICE BEHAVIOR on ^GSPC and QQQ monthly data. Primary source: Fama EF (1970) Efficient capital markets doi:10.2307/2325486 (establishes the random-walk baseline against which QA orbit prediction is tested). MAPPING: monthly log-return → rank in N-return window → bin=floor(rank*27/N) ∈ Z/27Z; consecutive pairs (b=bins[t-1], e=bins[t]) → orbit_class. PRIMARY RESULT: S-orbit (b%9==0 AND e%9==0) predicts 1.99x higher next-month VOLATILITY on GSPC (S=6.30% vs C=3.17% mean abs return; perm_p=0.0002). QQQ confirms: ratio=1.62x, perm_p=0.0458. DIRECTION (S-orbit): mean=-1.30%, pos_rate=41.7%, perm_p=0.119 (marginal, n_S=12). Sat-orbit direction: mean=+1.34% vs C=+0.62%, perm_p=0.276 (not significant). HONEST NULL (T-step deviation): predictive dev_t perm_p=0.9444. VOLATILITY ORDERING: S=6.30% > Sat=3.53% > C=3.17%. CERTIFIED: (C1) GSPC S vol perm_p<0.01 PASS. (C2) GSPC S/C ratio=1.99x PASS. (C3) QQQ ratio=1.62x PASS. (C4) S mean_ret<0 PASS. (C5) Sat mean_ret>C PASS. (C6) vol ordering S>Sat>=C PASS. Structural parents: cert [110] (Witt Tower), certs [453]-[456]. Validated 2026-06-18.
